title: Data Transparency
summary: This Treasury.gov page provides administrative information about tax credit programs including Qualified Opportunity Zones and Energy Communities, along with links to datasets used for determining program eligibility. The page does not contain market-moving information, economic data releases, or macro catalysts.
key_points: Qualified Opportunity Zones (QOZs) under section 1400Z-2 of the IRC provide tax benefits for qualifying investments in designated census tracts
The One, Big, Beautiful Bill Act (Pub. L. 119-21) lowered the substantial improvement test threshold for rural QOZs
Energy Community Bonus Credit provides increased tax credits under sections 45, 45Y, 48, and 48E of the IRC
Treasury provides datasets for determining energy community status and identifying rural QOZs
This is a data transparency/hub page listing program resources, not a news release or policy announcement
why_it_matters: This page is not relevant for finance research or RAG applications focused on macro catalysts. It is administrative documentation for tax credit programs and does not contain economic data, policy decisions, or market-moving information.
